text.title: PM Certification Alignment 2026 Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply PM Certification Alignment 2026 end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: tag-methodologies
step.action: Per methodology: add ECO domain + theme tags.

step.name: compute-coverage
step.action: Count per domain × theme; compare to ECO 2026 weights.

step.name: identify-gaps
step.decision-gate: If gap count > 10, route to PMO instead of single owner.

step.name: publish-and-track
step.action: Validate; publish; schedule next quarterly review.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix before publish.
